requirement_topic.en: Import Conformity Assessment — Regulated Electrical Products (Ministry of Industry and Trade attestation / CMIM-type verification; IMANOR)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口符合性评定——受管制电气产品（工业和贸易部证明/CMIM类核验；IMANOR）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口符合性評定——受管制電氣產品（工業和貿易部證明/CMIM類核驗；IMANOR）

summary.en: Morocco runs a mandatory import-control / conformity-assessment scheme for regulated electrical products administered by the Ministry of Industry and Trade, under which household refrigerators must demonstrate conformity before customs clearance and market placement. Conformity is shown via IMANOR product certification (the NM mark) against the NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and the NM-adopted CISPR 14 / EN 55014 series (EMC), and/or via an accepted conformity attestation / verification-of-conformity at import (a CMIM-type attestation arrangement). The assessment package typically includes: test reports against the NM-adopted IEC standards (CB-Scheme reports are the most portable), a declaration/attestation, product technical documentation, and labelling/markings in Arabic and/or French. Entry is through ports such as Casablanca and Tanger Med, where the responsible in-country importer presents the conformity evidence. There is no EU-style single CE self-declaration: Morocco relies on certification and import-side verification rather than manufacturer self-declaration with a DoC.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥实行由工业和贸易部主管的受管制电气产品强制进口管制/合格评定方案，家用电冰箱须在清关及投放市场前证明符合性。符合性通过IMANOR产品认证（NM标志）针对采纳IEC 60335-2-24的NM标准（安全）及NM采纳的CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列（电磁兼容）证明，和/或通过进口环节被接受的符合性证明/符合性核验（CMIM类证明安排）证明。评定材料通常包括：针对NM采纳IEC标准的检测报告（CB体系报告最具可移植性）、声明/证明、产品技术文件，以及阿拉伯语和/或法语的标识/标记。货物经卡萨布兰卡、丹吉尔地中海等港口入境，由负责的本地进口商提交符合性证据。不存在欧盟式的单一CE自我声明：摩洛哥依靠认证及进口端核验，而非制造商自我声明加DoC。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥實行由工業和貿易部主管的受管制電氣產品強制進口管制/合格評定方案，家用電冰箱須在清關及投放市場前證明符合性。符合性通過IMANOR產品認證（NM標誌）針對採納IEC 60335-2-24的NM標準（安全）及NM採納的CISPR 14 / EN 55014系列（電磁相容）證明，和/或通過進口環節被接受的符合性證明/符合性核驗（CMIM類證明安排）證明。評定材料通常包括：針對NM採納IEC標準的檢測報告（CB體系報告最具可移植性）、聲明/證明、產品技術文件，以及阿拉伯語和/或法語的標識/標記。貨物經卡薩布蘭卡、丹吉爾地中海等港口入境，由負責的本地進口商提交符合性證據。不存在歐盟式的單一CE自我聲明：摩洛哥依靠認證及進口端核驗，而非製造商自我聲明加DoC。

standards_or_laws: Morocco Ministry of Industry and Trade import-control / conformity-assessment scheme for regulated electrical products (verification of conformity at import; attestation / CMIM-type arrangement)
IMANOR product certification (NM mark) against the NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and the NM-adopted CISPR 14 / EN 55014 series (EMC)
Customs entry via Casablanca / Tanger Med — conformity evidence presented by the in-country importer

summary.en: In China, regulated household appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, plus a separate China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) — all enforced domestically by SAMR/CNCA. CCC is a domestic-market certification: there is no Chinese export-side scheme that produces conformity evidence pre-formatted for Morocco's import-control regime. The CCC certificate proves Chinese-market conformity to GB standards, but it is not, by itself, accepted at the Moroccan border; the manufacturer/importer must obtain Morocco-recognised conformity evidence (IMANOR/NM certification or an accepted attestation) referencing the NM-adopted IEC standards.
summary.zh: 在中国，受管制家用器具在国内销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并另需中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）——均由SAMR/CNCA在国内执行。CCC为国内市场认证：中国没有为摩洛哥进口管制制度预先格式化生成符合性证据的出口端方案。CCC证书证明产品符合中国市场的GB标准，但其本身不被摩洛哥口岸接受；制造商/进口商须取得摩洛哥认可的、引用NM采纳IEC标准的符合性证据（IMANOR/NM认证或被接受的证明）。
summary.zht: 在中國，受管制家用器具在國內銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並另需中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）——均由SAMR/CNCA在國內執行。CCC為國內市場認證：中國沒有為摩洛哥進口管制制度預先格式化生成符合性證據的出口端方案。CCC證書證明產品符合中國市場的GB標準，但其本身不被摩洛哥口岸接受；製造商/進口商須取得摩洛哥認可的、引用NM採納IEC標準的符合性證據（IMANOR/NM認證或被接受的證明）。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR (domestic-market scheme)
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese exporters must assemble Morocco-specific conformity evidence; CCC and the China Energy Label do not clear the Moroccan border: (1) Obtain IMANOR/NM certification or an accepted import conformity attestation (CMIM-type verification of conformity) referencing the NM-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 and CISPR 14 / EN 55014 texts — this is a certification/verification route, not an EU-style self-declared DoC. (2) Test reports — IECEE CB-Scheme reports against the underlying IEC standards are the most portable and can materially reduce duplicate testing, but the manufacturer must confirm acceptance and any Morocco-specific deviations with IMANOR or an accredited conformity-assessment body. (3) Documentation/marking — instructions and markings must be provided in Arabic and/or French. (4) Importer-led submission — the in-country importer presents the conformity package at clearance (Casablanca / Tanger Med); without it, goods can be blocked at customs. There is no EU-equivalent CE/DoC pathway — Morocco's instrument is certification plus import-side verification.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须组建摩洛哥专属符合性证据；CCC和中国能效标识不能放行摩洛哥口岸：（1）取得IMANOR/NM认证或被接受的进口符合性证明（CMIM类符合性核验），引用NM采纳的IEC 60335-2-24及CISPR 14 / EN 55014文本——此为认证/核验路径，而非欧盟式的自我声明DoC。（2）检测报告——针对底层IEC标准的IECEE CB体系报告最具可移植性，可显著减少重复检测，但制造商须就接受程度及摩洛哥特定偏差与IMANOR或认可的合格评定机构确认。（3）文件/标识——说明书及标识须以阿拉伯语和/或法语提供。（4）进口商主导提交——本地进口商在清关（卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海）时提交符合性材料；缺此货物可能被海关扣留。不存在欧盟式的CE/DoC路径——摩洛哥的工具是认证加进口端核验。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須組建摩洛哥專屬符合性證據；CCC和中國能效標識不能放行摩洛哥口岸：（1）取得IMANOR/NM認證或被接受的進口符合性證明（CMIM類符合性核驗），引用NM採納的IEC 60335-2-24及CISPR 14 / EN 55014文本——此為認證/核驗路徑，而非歐盟式的自我聲明DoC。（2）檢測報告——針對底層IEC標準的IECEE CB體系報告最具可移植性，可顯著減少重複檢測，但製造商須就接受程度及摩洛哥特定偏差與IMANOR或認可的合格評定機構確認。（3）文件/標識——說明書及標識須以阿拉伯語和/或法語提供。（4）進口商主導提交——本地進口商在清關（卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海）時提交符合性材料；缺此貨物可能被海關扣留。不存在歐盟式的CE/DoC路徑——摩洛哥的工具是認證加進口端核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — import conformity assessment (IMANOR/NM certification or an accepted CMIM-type attestation referencing the NM-adopted IEC standards) is required before customs clearance and market placement; not a self-declared CE/DoC pathway
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label required before sale in China; CCC is a domestic-market scheme not accepted at the Moroccan border

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco gates regulated electrical products at import through a Ministry of Industry and Trade conformity-assessment scheme — IMANOR/NM certification or an accepted CMIM-type attestation against the NM-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14 standards. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not clear the Moroccan border; an IECEE CB report can reduce duplicate testing. Documentation must be in Arabic/French and the in-country importer presents the package at Casablanca / Tanger Med.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥通过工业和贸易部的合格评定方案在进口环节管控受管制电气产品——以IMANOR/NM认证或被接受的CMIM类证明针对NM采纳的IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14标准。中国CCC和中国能效标识不能放行摩洛哥口岸；IECEE CB报告可减少重复检测。文件须为阿拉伯语/法语，由本地进口商在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海提交材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥通過工業和貿易部的合格評定方案在進口環節管控受管制電氣產品——以IMANOR/NM認證或被接受的CMIM類證明針對NM採納的IEC 60335-2-24 / CISPR 14標準。中國CCC和中國能效標識不能放行摩洛哥口岸；IECEE CB報告可減少重複檢測。文件須為阿拉伯語/法語，由本地進口商在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海提交材料。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record — Resident Responsible Party for Regulated Imports (importateur)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地登记进口商——受管制进口的境内责任方（importateur）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地登記進口商——受管制進口的境內責任方（importateur）

summary.en: Morocco channels regulated imports through a resident in-country importer (importateur) who acts as the responsible party for customs clearance, presentation of conformity evidence, and ongoing market accountability. For household refrigerators, the importer holds or has access to the conformity package (IMANOR/NM certification or accepted attestation, test reports, technical documentation), is identified to the authorities and on import documentation, and is the entity through which the Ministry of Industry and Trade import-control verification is processed at ports such as Casablanca and Tanger Med. The importer is also the practical point of contact for the energy label and any post-market follow-up. A foreign manufacturer cannot place goods on the Moroccan market without this in-country importer/responsible party — a logistics agent or freight forwarder does not satisfy the role unless properly mandated as importer of record.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过常驻本地进口商（importateur）办理受管制进口，由其作为清关、提交符合性证据及持续市场问责的责任方。对家用电冰箱而言，进口商持有或可取得符合性材料（IMANOR/NM认证或被接受的证明、检测报告、技术文件），向主管机构及进口文件中标明其身份，并作为工业和贸易部进口管制核验在卡萨布兰卡、丹吉尔地中海等港口办理的主体。进口商亦为能效标签及任何市场后续跟进的实际联系点。外国制造商在没有该本地进口商/责任方的情况下不得在摩洛哥市场投放货物——物流代理或货运代理除非被正式授权为登记进口商，否则不满足该角色。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥通過常駐本地進口商（importateur）辦理受管制進口，由其作為清關、提交符合性證據及持續市場問責的責任方。對家用電冰箱而言，進口商持有或可取得符合性材料（IMANOR/NM認證或被接受的證明、檢測報告、技術文件），向主管機構及進口文件中標明其身份，並作為工業和貿易部進口管制核驗在卡薩布蘭卡、丹吉爾地中海等港口辦理的主體。進口商亦為能效標籤及任何市場後續跟進的實際聯繫點。外國製造商在沒有該本地進口商/責任方的情況下不得在摩洛哥市場投放貨物——物流代理或貨運代理除非被正式授權為登記進口商，否則不滿足該角色。

standards_or_laws: Morocco import-control framework — regulated imports cleared through a resident in-country importer (importateur) as responsible party
Ministry of Industry and Trade import-conformity verification processed via the importer at customs (Casablanca / Tanger Med)
Importer holds/presents the conformity package (IMANOR/NM certification or accepted attestation, test reports, technical documentation)

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent obligating an export manufacturer to appoint a foreign-country resident importer-of-record/responsible party for product compliance abroad. Domestically, the CCC certificate holder is the responsible party for Chinese-market compliance, but this role does not extend to or satisfy a destination-country importer obligation. Chinese exporters typically engage overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis; for Morocco, that counterparty must specifically be the resident importateur recognised by Moroccan customs/authorities, not merely a commercial buyer.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商为境外产品合规指定一名目的国常驻登记进口商/责任方。在国内，CCC证书持有人为中国市场合规的责任方，但该角色不延伸至、亦不满足目的国进口商义务。中国出口商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司；对摩洛哥而言，该对手方须明确为摩洛哥海关/主管机构认可的常驻importateur，而不仅是商业买家。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商為境外產品合規指定一名目的國常駐登記進口商/責任方。在國內，CCC證書持有人為中國市場合規的責任方，但該角色不延伸至、亦不滿足目的國進口商義務。中國出口商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司；對摩洛哥而言，該對手方須明確為摩洛哥海關/主管機構認可的常駐importateur，而不僅是商業買家。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent obligating appointment of a destination-country importer of record

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot place goods on the Moroccan market directly without a resident in-country importer (importateur) of record: (1) The importer must be identified to Moroccan customs/authorities and is the entity that presents the conformity package and clears the import-control verification at Casablanca / Tanger Med. (2) The importer carries practical responsibility for the energy label, documentation in Arabic/French, and post-market follow-up. (3) A freight forwarder, customs broker, or testing lab does not satisfy the importer-of-record role unless formally mandated. Note the contrast with the EU: this is NOT an EU-style 'Authorised Representative for a manufacturer selling direct' — Morocco's model is a resident importer-of-record channelling the goods, so the cross-border-e-commerce-direct pattern that triggers an EU AR is generally not available without establishing this importer.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商在没有常驻本地登记进口商（importateur）的情况下不能直接在摩洛哥市场投放货物：（1）进口商须向摩洛哥海关/主管机构标明身份，并作为在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海提交符合性材料、通过进口管制核验的主体。（2）进口商对能效标签、阿拉伯语/法语文件及市场后续跟进承担实际责任。（3）货运代理、报关行或检测实验室除非被正式授权，否则不满足登记进口商角色。需注意与欧盟的区别：这并非欧盟式的「制造商直接销售时的授权代表」——摩洛哥模式是由常驻登记进口商承接货物，因此触发欧盟授权代表的跨境电商直销模式在未设立该进口商的情况下一般不可用。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商在沒有常駐本地登記進口商（importateur）的情況下不能直接在摩洛哥市場投放貨物：（1）進口商須向摩洛哥海關/主管機構標明身份，並作為在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海提交符合性材料、通過進口管制核驗的主體。（2）進口商對能效標籤、阿拉伯語/法語文件及市場後續跟進承擔實際責任。（3）貨運代理、報關行或檢測實驗室除非被正式授權，否則不滿足登記進口商角色。需注意與歐盟的區別：這並非歐盟式的「製造商直接銷售時的授權代表」——摩洛哥模式是由常駐登記進口商承接貨物，因此觸發歐盟授權代表的跨境電商直銷模式在未設立該進口商的情況下一般不可用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a resident in-country importer (importateur) of record is required to clear regulated imports and present conformity evidence; a foreign manufacturer cannot place goods on the Moroccan market without it
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to appoint a destination-country importer of record

source.publisher: Ministère de l'Industrie et du Commerce (Morocco Ministry of Industry and Trade)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A resident in-country importer (importateur) of record is a hard gate for placing Chinese refrigerators on the Moroccan market — the importer presents the conformity package and clears import-control verification at Casablanca / Tanger Med. This differs from the EU Authorised Representative model: Morocco channels regulated goods through a resident importer, so direct manufacturer placement without one is generally not available. A freight forwarder or broker does not satisfy the role unless formally mandated.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 常驻本地登记进口商（importateur）是中国电冰箱投放摩洛哥市场的强制性门槛——由进口商提交符合性材料并在卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海通过进口管制核验。此与欧盟授权代表模式不同：摩洛哥由常驻进口商承接受管制货物，因此无该进口商时制造商一般无法直接投放。货运代理或报关行除非被正式授权，否则不满足该角色。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 常駐本地登記進口商（importateur）是中國電冰箱投放摩洛哥市場的強制性門檻——由進口商提交符合性材料並在卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海通過進口管制核驗。此與歐盟授權代表模式不同：摩洛哥由常駐進口商承接受管制貨物，因此無該進口商時製造商一般無法直接投放。貨運代理或報關行除非被正式授權，否則不滿足該角色。
